ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.443) to justify inclusion for the Director of Master Data Management. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.443 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Leadership & Strategy. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Leadership & Strategy is not sufficiently central to the Director of Master Data Management to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Master Data Management roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Leadership & Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Master Data Management. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Master Data Management competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.443) and edge-domain placement (Leadership & Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Master Data Management. All passes support exclusion.
